title: Superluminal Transit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Superluminal transit''' was the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] method of faster-than-light travel. The Vong used organically grown creatures, such as [[dovin basal]]s, to propel [[Koros-Strohna]] and other Vong craft.

==Behind the scenes==
As of this writing, it is unknown if the term '''Superluminal transit''' is simply the Yuuzhan Vong name for [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], or another form of faster than light transportation entirely.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{Mo}}

[[Category:Yuuzhan Vong culture]]
